name: com.heathen.hatefoundation
description: Heathen Attribute [gp]Tag Engine — a data-oriented, GameplayTag-addressed attribute/effect/ability system built on DataLens (our non-OOP answer to Unreal GAS). Typed/ranged attributes, instant/duration/cap-buff/stacking effects, status + compiled tag conditions, abilities (cost/cooldown/requirement/cues), immunity, and mass utility AI.
